verse.name: V1
verse.lines: Let Your Word be born In the manger of my heart, Let It live in me, let It start; Live inside this house of clay, And mold me everyday; Let Your Word be born In the manger of my heart.

verse.name: V2
verse.lines: Consume me Lord by the fire of Your Spirit. Consume me Lord And make me more like You. Won't You break me Lord And mend the broken pieces of my life; Let me be used, Lord, by You!

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: I'll obey and trust You, I'll obey because I love You. I'll obey, My life is in Your hands! For it's the way to prove my love When feelings go away, Though it cost me everything, I'll obey!
